content: true true true true true true NASDAQ NASDAQ NASDAQ NASDAQ NASDAQ NASDAQ NASDAQ false aapl Zero500NotesDue2031Member aapl One375NotesDue2029Member us-gaap CommonStockMember aapl Three600NotesDue2042Member aapl Three050NotesDue2029Member aapl Two000NotesDue2027Member aapl One625NotesDue2026Member UNITED STATES SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE COMMISSION Washington, D.C. FORM 8-K CURRENT REPORT Pursuant to Section OR of The Securities Exchange Act of February Date of Report Date of earliest event reported Apple Inc. Exact name of Registrant as specified in its charter California State or other jurisdiction of incorporation Commission File Number I.R.S. Employer Identification No. One Apple Park Way Cupertino California Address of principal executive offices Zip Code Registrant telephone number, including area code Not applicable Former name or former address, if changed since last report. Check the appropriate box below if the Form 8-K filing is intended to simultaneously satisfy the filing obligation of the Registrant under any of the following provisions Written communications pursuant to Rule under the Securities Act CFR Soliciting material pursuant to Rule under the Exchange Act CFR Pre-commencement communications pursuant to Rule 14d-2 under the Exchange Act CFR Pre-commencement communications pursuant to Rule 13e-4 under the Exchange Act CFR Securities registered pursuant to Section of the Act Title of each class Trading symbol Name of each exchange on which registered Common Stock, par value per share AAPL The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC Notes due The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC Notes due The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC Notes due The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC Notes due The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC Notes due The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC Notes due The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC Indicate by check mark whether the Registrant is an emerging growth company as defined in Rule of the Securities Act of of this chapter or Rule 12b-2 of the Securities Exchange Act of of this chapter Emerging growth company If an emerging growth company, indicate by check mark if the Registrant has elected not to use the extended transition period for complying with any new or revised financial accounting standards provided pursuant to Section of the Exchange Act Item Submission of Matters to Vote of Security Holders. The Annual Meeting of Shareholders the Annual Meeting of Apple Inc. Apple was held on February At the Annual Meeting, Apple shareholders voted on the following five proposals and cast their votes as described below. The individuals listed below were elected at the Annual Meeting to serve as directors of Apple until the next annual meeting of shareholders and until their successors are duly elected and qualified For Against Abstained Broker Non-Vote Wanda Austin Tim Cook Alex Gorsky Andrea Jung Art Levinson Monica Lozano Ron Sugar Sue Wagner management proposal to ratify the appointment of Ernst Young LLP as Apple independent registered public accounting firm for fiscal year was approved For Against Abstained An advisory resolution to approve executive compensation was approved. For Against Abstained Broker Non-Vote management proposal to approve the Apple Inc. Non-Employee Director Stock Plan, as Amended and Restated was approved The Apple Inc. Non-Employee Director Stock Plan, as Amended and Restated, is filed as Exhibit hereto. For Against Abstained Broker Non-Vote shareholder proposal entitled China Entanglement Audit was not approved For Against Abstained Broker Non-Vote Item Financial Statements and Exhibits. Exhibits. Exhibit Number Exhibit Description Apple Inc. Non-Employee Director Stock Plan, as Amended and Restated, effective as of February Form of Restricted Stock Unit Award Agreement under Non-Employee Director Stock Plan, effective as of February Inline XBRL for the cover page of this Current Report on Form 8-K. SIGNATURE Pursuant to the requirements of the Securities Exchange Act of the Registrant has duly caused this report to be signed on its behalf by the undersigned hereunto duly authorized. Date February Apple Inc. By Katherine Adams Katherine Adams Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary

title: AAPL technical snapshot from Yahoo Finance
content: 近6个月价格最新收盘约为 246.21，SMA20=254.45，SMA60=260.35，趋势判断为震荡/下行。近5日均量与20日均量对比显示量能平稳（5日均量 36825229，20日均量 39498197）。若价格持续运行在SMA20与SMA60上方，技术面偏强；若失守SMA60并放量下跌，需提升风控等级。

title: TSLA technical snapshot from Yahoo Finance
content: 近6个月价格最新收盘约为 352.66，SMA20=388.24，SMA60=412.58，趋势判断为震荡/下行。近5日均量与20日均量对比显示量能平稳（5日均量 57158999，20日均量 60856925）。若价格持续运行在SMA20与SMA60上方，技术面偏强；若失守SMA60并放量下跌，需提升风控等级。
